differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
Occult malignancy (e.g., indolent lymphoma or metastatic occult carcinoma with sterile-appearing granulomatous reaction)
Sarcoidosis with secondary chronic bacterial abscess formation (due to immune dysregulation)
next_steps: Perform comprehensive immunologic workup: quantitative immunoglobulins (IgG, IgA, IgM) and vaccine response titers
Obtain peripheral blood lymphocyte subset analysis (T, B, NK cells)
Send hepatic/splenic abscess fluid for metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS) to exclude fastidious or unculturable organisms
Genetic testing for primary immunodeficiency panel (including STAT3, CYBB, and CTLA4 genes)
Perform a wedge liver biopsy to better assess architectural distortion and portal hypertension etiology
Consultation with clinical immunology and infectious disease experts for longitudinal management
